description: People configuration for the Executive Intelligence Preprocessor (EIP). Provides canonical identity resolution, role metadata, authority domains, decision authority, functional metadata, speaker categorisation, and classification for all known meeting participants. Used by Step 4 (Enrichment) for deterministic name resolution and by Step 3 (Semantic Extraction) for people-aware contribution extraction. Version 1.5 promotes three partial-name entries to full people (Manasi Bhabal, Gaurav Ranjan Mhatre, Shweta Tripathi) and adds four new entries from people_recommendations.json (Jackie Kaur, Penny Taylor, Abhijeet, Johannes Blüml).

config_rules.email_matching: case-insensitive; store email aliases in lowercase
config_rules.unresolved_names: flag as UNRESOLVED in output and append to /config/people_recommendations.json
config_rules.update_policy: manual only — pipeline must never auto-mutate this file
config_rules.backward_compatibility: authority_domains remains supported for legacy summaries; new reasoning should prefer functional_area, topic_expertise, decision_authority, seniority_level, speaker_category, and reporting_context
config_rules.reporting_context_policy: do not infer formal reporting lines unless explicitly maintained; use primary_executive_contact or primary_operational_contact for non-reporting relationships
config_rules.candidate_people_policy: candidate_people must not be used for deterministic identity resolution until manually promoted to people
